info.title: Desktop editing
info.body: Live code editing uses the Terrane desktop app, where source files stay local and rebuild on save. This web host runs installed apps.
perm.title: Permission request
perm.note: Approving grants access for this session. Review grants in the admin console.
settings.title: User settings
settings.subject: Subject
settings.note: The identity shown here is this Terrane home's local owner. Signing in with Google connects this browser to the configured Terrane Premium control plane — optional; local execution never requires it.
